parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [ ['{{sender}}', $('parse').item.json.sender], ['{{receiver}}', $('parse').item.json.receiver], ['{{port}}', $('parse').item.json.port], ['{{invoice}}', $('parse').item.json.invoice], ['{{container}}', $('parse').item.json.container], ['{{weight}}', $('parse').item.json.weight], ['{{truck}}', $('parse').item.json.truck], ['{{trailer}}', $('parse').item.json.trailer] ].map(p => ({ replaceAllText: { containsText: { text: p[0], matchCase: true }, replaceText: String(p[1]||'') } })) }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parsed: { container: $('parse').item.json.container, sender: $('parse').item.json.sender, receiver: $('parse').item.json.receiver, port: $('parse').item.json.port, weight: $('parse').item.json.weight, invoice: $('parse').item.json.invoice, truck: $('parse').item.json.truck, trailer: $('parse').item.json.trailer }, docId: $('copy').item.json.id, leftoverPlaceholders: ($('verify').item.json.txt.match(/\{\{[a-z]+\}\}/g) || []) }) }}
